title: The Difference Betwixt Kings And Subjects.
content:
'Twixt kings and subjects there's this mighty odds:
    Subjects are taught by men; kings by the gods.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "The Difference Betwixt Kings And Subjects.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
